рқ—ўрқ—Јрқ—–-рқ—Ұрқ—һрқ—ңрқ—ҹрқ—ҹрқ—Ұ | To empower solopreneurs and one-person companies by providing ready-to-use automation skills that enhance the functionality of AI coding assistants for tasks like marketing, content creation, and research.  рҹҢҹ Rising Fast!

в—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳ

рқ—§рқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—ӣ рқ—Ұрқ—§рқ—”рқ—–рқ—һ: рҹҗҚ Python 
рҹҺҜ рқ—Ёрқ—Ұрқ—ҳ рқ—–рқ—”рқ—Ұрқ—ҳ: To empower solopreneurs and one-person companies by providing ready-to-use automation skills that enhance the functionality of AI coding assistants for tasks like marketing, content creation, and research.
рҹ“… Created: Jan 2026 вҖў Updated: Apr 2026

в—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳ

вңЁ рқ—һрқ—ҳрқ—¬ рқ—ҷрқ—ҳрқ—”рқ—§рқ—Ёрқ—Ҙрқ—ҳрқ—Ұ вңЁ

вң… Extensible AI agent skills for various coding assistants
вң… Self-contained skill modules with instructions and metadata
вң… Dynamic loading of skills by AI agents
вң… Includes skills for SEO/GEO optimization, demand research, domain hunting, logo creation, banner creation, image generation, and Reddit content retrieval
вң… Supports integration with Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex


в—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳ

рҹ“Ҡ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§ рқ—Ұрқ—§рқ—”рқ—§рқ—Ұ

вӯҗвӯҗвӯҗ 755 рқҳҖрқҳҒрқ—®рқ—ҝрқҳҖ
рҹҚҙ 85 рқ—ірқ—јрқ—ҝрқ—ёрқҳҖ
рҹ”Қ 3 рқ—јрқ—Ҫрқ—Ірқ—» рқ—¶рқҳҖрқҳҖрқҳӮрқ—ІрқҳҖ

в—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳ

рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

OPC Skills provides a collection of pre-built AI agent "skills" designed to enhance the capabilities of AI assistants like Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex. These skills are self-contained modules containing instructions, scripts, and resources that AI agents can dynamically load to perform specialized tasks, making them more powerful for solopreneurs and one-person companies.

рҹ”— рқ—ҹрқ—ңрқ—Ўрқ—һрқ—Ұ
вҖў рқ—ҡрқ—¶рқҳҒрқ—ӣрқҳӮрқ—Ҝ: https://github.com/ReScienceLab/opc-skills

рқ—қрқ— рқ—ҳрқ—§рқ—ҳрқ—Ҙ | Performance and load testing of applications and services to measure their strength and analyze overall performance under simulated heavy loads.  вңЁ Notable!

в—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—ү

рқ—§рқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—ӣ рқ—Ұрқ—§рқ—”рқ—–рқ—һ: вҳ• Java 
рҹҺҜ рқ—Ёрқ—Ұрқ—ҳ рқ—–рқ—”рқ—Ұрқ—ҳ: Performance and load testing of applications and services to measure their strength and analyze overall performance under simulated heavy loads.
рҹ“… Created: May 2010 вҖў Updated: Apr 2026

в—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—ү

вңЁ рқ—һрқ—ҳрқ—¬ рқ—ҷрқ—ҳрқ—”рқ—§рқ—Ёрқ—Ҙрқ—ҳрқ—Ұ вңЁ

вң… Performance and load testing for web applications, web services, FTP, JDBC, LDAP, MOM, Mail, and more
вң… Fully featured Test IDE for recording, building, and debugging test plans
вң… Command-line mode (non-GUI) for load testing from any Java-compatible OS
вң… Dynamic HTML reporting and live reporting to third-party databases
вң… Easy correlation for extracting data from various response formats (HTML, JSON, XML, text)
вң… Highly extensible core with scriptable samplers (Groovy), pluggable tiers, and data analysis plugins

вӯҗвӯҗвӯҗвӯҗ 9.3K рқҳҖрқҳҒрқ—®рқ—ҝрқҳҖ
рҹҚҙ 2.3K рқ—ірқ—јрқ—ҝрқ—ёрқҳҖ
рҹ”Қ 883 рқ—јрқ—Ҫрқ—Ірқ—» рқ—¶рқҳҖрқҳҖрқҳӮрқ—ІрқҳҖ

рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

Apache JMeter is an open-source Java application designed for performance and load testing of various services. It simulates heavy loads to analyze application strength and performance under different conditions, offering a comprehensive feature set for detailed testing and reporting.

в—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—үв—ү

рҹ“… Created: Jan 2026 вҖў Updated: Apr 2026

в—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳв—Ҳ

вңЁ рқ—һрқ—ҳрқ—¬ рқ—ҷрқ—ҳрқ—”рқ—§рқ—Ёрқ—Ҙрқ—ҳрқ—Ұ вңЁ

вң… Hybrid autoregressive + diffusion decoder architecture
вң… 9B-parameter autoregressive generator initialized from GLM-4-9B-0414
вң… 7B-parameter diffusion decoder based on DiT architecture
вң… Glyph Encoder text module for accurate text rendering
вң… Post-training with decoupled reinforcement learning (GRPO) for enhanced semantic understanding and visual detail
вң… Supports both text-to-image and image-to-image generation
вң… Image-to-image tasks include editing, style transfer, identity-preserving generation, and multi-subject consistency

вӯҗвӯҗвӯҗ 871 рқҳҖрқҳҒрқ—®рқ—ҝрқҳҖ

рҹ”Қ 20 рқ—јрқ—Ҫрқ—Ірқ—» рқ—¶рқҳҖрқҳҖрқҳӮрқ—ІрқҳҖ

рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

GLM-Image is an advanced image generation model that utilizes a hybrid autoregressive and diffusion decoder architecture. It excels in generating high-fidelity images, particularly those requiring precise semantic understanding, complex information expression, and accurate text rendering, while also supporting a wide array of image-to-image tasks.

вңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰ

рқ—§рқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—ӣ рқ—Ұрқ—§рқ—”рқ—–рқ—һ: рҹҗҚ Python 
рҹҺҜ рқ—Ёрқ—Ұрқ—ҳ рқ—–рқ—”рқ—Ұрқ—ҳ: Optimizing LLM inference by intelligently routing queries to the most appropriate language model.
рҹ“… Created: Oct 2025 вҖў Updated: Apr 2026

вңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰвңҰ

вңЁ рқ—һрқ—ҳрқ—¬ рқ—ҷрқ—ҳрқ—”рқ—§рқ—Ёрқ—Ҙрқ—ҳрқ—Ұ вңЁ

вң… Smart Routing: Automatically routes queries to the optimal LLM based on task complexity, cost, and performance.
вң… Multiple Router Models: Support for over 16 routing models across single-round, multi-round, agentic, and personalized categories.
вң… Unified CLI: Command-line interface for training, inference, and interactive chat with Gradio UI.
вң… Data Generation Pipeline: Complete pipeline for generating training data from benchmark datasets with automatic API calling and evaluation.
вң… ComfyUI Interface: Visual interface for constructing data generation and routing pipelines.
вң… OpenClaw Router Integration: OpenAI-compatible server deployment with multimodal understanding and retrieval-augmented routing memory.

рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

LLMRouter is an open-source Python library designed for intelligent routing of Large Language Model (LLM) inferences. It dynamically selects the most suitable LLM for a given query based on factors like complexity, cost, and performance, supporting over 16 diverse routing models and offering a unified CLI for training, inference, and chat.

Tuitube is a command-line interface (CLI) tool that provides a Text User Interface (TUI) for downloading videos from various popular platforms like YouTube, X (Twitter), Twitch, and Instagram. It leverages the power of yt-dlp to handle the actual downloading process.
